strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP code generators
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: No explicit mention of Master’s/PhD in AI-related field despite preference
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience
AI expertise appears project-adjacent rather than product-led at scale
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, hands-on engineering experience across AI-adjacent systems, cloud infrastructure, and open-source leadership, with clear contributions to agentic workflows and developer tooling. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of strategic cloud product vision or direct customer advisory roles critical for the director-level IC position, and while his technical breadth is impressive, his AI focus is more implementation than strategy.
